title: [phase:critique] [family:remaining-gaps] [provider_hint:codex] In /Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator, review the current cost-aware kernel/vote changes and identify remaining unimplemented gaps after: metered_reason propagation, vote handoff snapshot wiring, local fallback quorum, and ZAI_API_KE...
summary_text: 1. **High**: Cost snapshot fields are resolved in caller context but never forwarded into the Tutti router call, so they are effectively dead after `ctx`. - [`fugue-tutti-caller.yml:199`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/fugue-tutti-caller.yml:199) - [`fugue-tutti-caller.yml:587`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/fugue-tutti-caller.yml:587) - [`fugue-tutti-router.yml:5`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/fugue-tutti-router.yml:5) 2. **High**: `metered_reason` is not wired into CI matrix resolution (`build-agent-matrix.sh` call omits `--metered-reason`), so metered specialist lanes cannot be activated from handoff snapshot in GitHub workflow path. - [`fugue-tutti-router.yml:1853`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/fugue-tutti-router.yml:1853) - [`build-agent-matrix.sh:396`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/lib/build-agent-matrix.sh:396) 3. **High**: Runner invocation in CI does not pass lane-level `metered_reason` into `subscription-agent-runner.sh` (`METERED_PROVIDER_REASON` missing), so even if a metered lane were present it would default to `none` and self-skip. - [`fugue-tutti-router.yml:619`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/fugue-tutti-router.yml:619) - [`subscription-agent-runner.sh:49`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/harness/subscription-agent-runner.sh:49) - [`subscription-agent-runner.sh:1000`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/harness/subscription-agent-runner.sh:1000) 4. **Medium**: Handoff snapshot values for cost/fallback are hardcoded placeholders (`none/false`) in route stage, not derived from runtime state, so propagation currently carries constants. - [`route-task-handoff.sh:434`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/harness/route-task-handoff.sh:434) 5. **Medium**: Matrix parity check is stale vs new metered policy and currently fails (`T6` expects Gemini/xAI lanes without metered reason). - [`check-agent-matrix-parity.sh:135`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/check-agent-matrix-parity.sh:135) - [`fugue-matrix-parity.yml:53`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/fugue-matrix-parity.yml:53) Executed verification: `test-resolve-orchestration-context`, `test-vote-handoff-simulation`, `test-local-orchestration-gates`, and `test-agent-runner-provider-compat` passed; `scripts/check-agent-matrix-parity.sh` failed on `T6` (missing metered opt-in lanes).
